_meta.description: Long-turn conversation scenarios to validate scope continuity and semantic memory recall behavior.

scenarios.objective: validate memory persistence, scoped followups, explicit doc switching, and evidence grounding across long turns

turns.message: Use budget.xlsx and give me a summary.

turns.expectation: locks explicit document scope and returns grounded overview

turns.message: Now compare with previous quarter without changing files.

turns.expectation: reuses active scope and preserves temporal continuity

turns.message: Switch to forecast.xlsx and quote the exact revenue assumption line.

turns.expectation: applies explicit switch, enforces scoped evidence, and avoids cross-document leakage

scenarios.objective: validate memory persistence, scoped followups, explicit doc switching, and evidence grounding across long turns

turns.message: Use o documento budget.xlsx e traga um resumo.

turns.expectation: locks explicit document scope and returns grounded overview

turns.message: Agora compare com o trimestre anterior sem trocar de arquivo.

turns.expectation: reuses active scope and preserves temporal continuity

turns.message: Troque para forecast.xlsx e cite a linha exata da premissa de receita.

turns.expectation: applies explicit switch, enforces scoped evidence, and avoids cross-document leakage
